# Verdantix Green Quadrant Sustainability Consulting Services 2026 - Deloitte

## 摘要

Verdantix recently released the Green Quadrant Sustainability Consulting Services 2026 report, which evaluates the performance of 23 leading sustainability consulting firms. Deloitte was one of the top performers in the report. The report assesses the firms' capabilities in areas such as climate change, circular economy, and stakeholder engagement. Deloitte's strengths in these areas have contributed to its high ranking. The report also highlights the growing demand for sustainability consulting services, driven by increasing regulatory pressure and consumer expectations. As a result, the sustainability consulting market is expected to continue growing in the coming years. Deloitte's expertise in this area will likely be in high demand, making it a key player in the market. The report provides valuable insights for organizations looking to improve their sustainability performance and for consulting firms seeking to expand their sustainability offerings.
